title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Fail to Agree on Peace Deal, Vance Says, Leaving Cease-Fire’s Fate Uncertain
summary_full: Vice President JD Vance said the Iranian delegation had not accepted American terms for ending the war after a marathon session in Pakistan.
summary_public: Vice President JD Vance said the Iranian delegation had not accepted American terms for ending the war after a marathon session in Pakistan.
